front: Film: a Humphrey Bogart-obsessed character (Michel) kills a police officer in a famous jarring five-shot sequence after being caught with a stolen car
back: Breathless / A bout de souffle (Jean-Luc Godard)

front: Movement: characterized by handheld cameras, natural lighting, jump cuts, and non-professional actors; inspired partly by Jean Rouch's Moi, un Noir
Movement: Left Bank directors include Chris Marker, Alain Resnais, Agnes Varda, and Jacques Demy; Right Bank includes Godard and Truffaut
Movement: Prix Jean Vigo (named for an influential predecessor director) was won by Ousmane Sembene for a Wolof-language film
Director: made Breathless; also directed Pierrot le fou and Vivre sa vie — both starring then-wife Anna Karina; neo-noir Alphaville
